description:
Offered: every fourth semester
This class focuses on the development of literature in the face of changes in science and industrialization in the 19th-century British Empire. Authors studied included Tennyson, Browning, Arnold, Barrett-Browning, and those who comprise “The Golden Age” of British Children’s Literature.
Prerequisite(s): ENGL 1200 or HON 1200
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, IHIP, LI
